author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Ogrika Ruch & Skins

Alongside the Ogrika Ruch release, we're launching 3 different skins:
1 Jupiter skin only obtainable through the $JUP token ,2 Puri skins only obtainable through the $PURI token ,
The skins will be available for a limited time, running for 7 days starting on February 5. 

All of the attached images are in-engine by the way.  

Note: the amount of tokens required for each skin will be disclosed closer to release to accommodate any volatility
